title: corethrogyne californica var. obovata
intro: Corethrogyne californica var. obovata, also known as California wedgebug sage, is a rare and unique variety of the Corethrogyne californica plant, native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Corethrogyne californica var. obovata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, this plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in smudging ceremonies to promote spiritual and emotional well-being.
